final_response:
**Quick steps to reset your password**

1. **Go to the login screen** and click **“Forgot Password.”**  
2. **Enter the email address** you used when you registered.  
3. **Check your inbox** for a reset link (it arrives within a few minutes).  
4. If you don’t see the email, **look in your spam/junk folder** and verify you typed the correct email address.  
5. **Open the link** and follow the prompts to create a new password.  
6. **Log in** with the new password.

If the reset link still doesn’t work or you can’t locate the email, let us know and we’ll add a note to your ticket so our team can prioritize a resolution for you. (We’ll also keep an eye on any stock concerns you have.)  

We’re here to help—please let us know once you’ve tried these steps or if you need further assistance.

hits.title: How do I reset my password?
hits.summary: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. A reset link will be sent to the registered email address. The link expires after 15 minutes. If the customer does not receive the email, advise them to check their spam folder and confirm the email address used at registration.

hits.title: Can I exchange a product?
hits.summary: We do not offer direct exchanges. Customers must return the original item for a refund and place a new, separate order for the desired item. If the customer is worried about stock availability, create a note on the ticket and our team will prioritize their new order.

hits.title: What payment methods do you accept?
hits.summary: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Aura Store Credit. We do not accept cryptocurrency, checks, or money orders.

data.body:
**Quick steps to reset your password**

1. **Go to the login screen** and click **“Forgot Password.”**  
2. **Enter the email address** you used when you registered.  
3. **Check your inbox** for a reset link (it arrives within a few minutes).  
4. If you don’t see the email, **look in your spam/junk folder** and verify you typed the correct email address.  
5. **Open the link** and follow the prompts to create a new password.  
6. **Log in** with the new password.

If the reset link still doesn’t work or you can’t locate the email, let us know and we’ll add a note to your ticket so our team can prioritize a resolution for you. (We’ll also keep an eye on any stock concerns you have.)  

We’re here to help—please let us know once you’ve tried these steps or if you need further assistance.
